text: Thank you for confirming your travel insurance cover under your Avant Membership Corporate Travel Insurance Policy with Cover-More, Australia's first choice for travel insurance. Below is a summary of your policy details. Please read this in conjunction with the Product Disclosure Statement which gives you a full description on what your policy covers and any conditions and limits that apply. Remember, should the unexpected occur, our emergency assistance team is here around the clock, 365 days a year to help. Have an enjoyable trip! Your Details Travel and Cover Details Upgrades Certificate of Insurance Mr Kiran Narula Policy Number: 5363885 Level 28, HSBC Centre, 580 George St Registration Number: 895 Sydney Issue Date: 13 Sep 2013 NSW 2000 Name: Mr Kiran Narula Member ID: NARULA005 E-Mail Address: naruki09@gmail.com Date of Birth: 5 Jul 1992 Policy Type: Corporate Destination: Europe, Asia and SW Pacific Date Departing: 25 Dec 2013 Date Returning 11 Jan 2014 Policy Duration (days) 18 Additional Paid Days (included in Policy Duration): $0.00 Spouse Cover: $0.00 Existing Medical/Pregnancy Cover: $0.00     Total Amount Payable: $0.00 Total GST Included: $0.00 Total Stamp Duty Included: $0.00 Emergency Assistance IMPORTANT: When calling, please have a contact number we can call you back on. Additional Information This policy has been issued on the basis that you have received the PDS and that the information contained on this certificate is true and correct. If this is not the case the policy may be invalid. Please contact the providing entity immediately. Please note that this policy has some limitations and exclusions. Please refer to the PDS for full details of what the policy does and does not cover. Some of the exclusions include: l The person/s insured under this corporate policy do not have automatic cover for existing medical conditions or some known pregnancies. Cover for these conditions will be considered upon receipt of the appropriate application form and additional premiums for the requested cover may be due. l Cover is only provided for unexpected serious pregnancy complications which occur during or before the 26th week of pregnancy. l No cover is provided for claims arising from childbirth or the health of a newborn child, irrespective of the stage of pregnancy at which the child is born. You have the right to cancel the policy by notifying the Providing Entity in writing within 15 working days. Please either contact us, or refer to the PDS for more information. This certificate is a receipt for monies received on behalf of Great Lakes Reinsurance (UK) PLC (ARBN 127 740 532, ABN 18 964 580 576 AFSL# 318 603), the Underwriter. If you are registered for GST purposes your input tax credit entitlement is based on the GST amount shown above. Please note that in accordance with the GST law relating to insurance premiums, the GST amount may be less than 1/11th of the total premium payable.
